inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Based on current market prices for sheet metal (e.g., steel, aluminum). Refer to ISO 9001 for material traceability.

inputs.label: Material Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Standard sheet metal gauges; affects bending force and scrap rate. ASTM A568/A568M for steel sheet.

inputs.label: Part Area
inputs.businessContext: Surface area of the flat pattern; used to calculate material usage and nesting efficiency.

inputs.label: Annual Volume
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly production quantity; influences tooling amortization and setup cost per part.

inputs.label: Setup Time per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Time to change dies and program CNC; SMED principles (Shigeo Shingo) for quick changeover.

inputs.label: Cycle Time per Part
inputs.businessContext: Time from start to finish for one part; includes punching, bending, and handling. Lean manufacturing standard.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average wage including overhead; based on industry benchmarks (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

inputs.label: Machine Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Includes depreciation, maintenance, energy; ISO 50001 for energy cost allocation.

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material wasted; Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defects. Typical range 1-5% for sheet metal.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of non-conforming parts; ISO 9001 quality management. Threshold >5% triggers critical warning.

inputs.label: Tooling Cost
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for dies and fixtures; amortized over annual volume. CAPEX evaluation.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs for indirect expenses (rent, utilities, admin). Activity-based costing.

inputs.label: Profit Margin Target
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin; used to calculate target price. Financial ratio analysis.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy; affects risk adjustment. Common in risk management frameworks.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Different materials have different costs, densities, and formability. ASTM material standards.

rules: if dataConfidence == 'low' then apply risk factor 1.2

hiddenLossDrivers: scrapRate > 10 ? 'High scrap rate increases material waste' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 5 ? 'Implement SPC and root cause analysis to reduce defects' : ''
scrapRate > 10 ? 'Optimize nesting and consider better material utilization' : ''
setupTimeHours > 4 ? 'Apply SMED techniques to reduce setup time' : ''
profitMarginTarget < 10 ? 'Review cost structure or increase target margin' : ''
